segments.text:
Today I'll show you how SonarQube 
can help you understand your issues

even when they exist across multiple 
locations in your code. As in the case

of many of our security vulnerabilities when 
we detect an injection flaw such as this one.

In fact, to understand the issue, it may require 
that you see not just the issue ultimately where

the vulnerability exists but the source 
which can exist in an even another file.

Using the keyboard or the mouse within SonarQube, 
you can navigate to understand the flow of data

supplied by a user to the location ultimately 
where the vulnerability finally exists you.

fullText:
Today I'll show you how SonarQube 
can help you understand your issues even when they exist across multiple 
locations in your code. As in the case of many of our security vulnerabilities when 
we detect an injection flaw such as this one. In fact, to understand the issue, it may require 
that you see not just the issue ultimately where the vulnerability exists but the source 
which can exist in an even another file. Using the keyboard or the mouse within SonarQube, 
you can navigate to understand the flow of data supplied by a user to the location ultimately 
where the vulnerability finally exists you.
